name: Bode Sport Complex
description: Bode Sport Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Saint Joseph, MO. There are 7 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Northside Sport complex
description: Northside Sport complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Joseph, MO. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Ricky Deans Court
description: Ricky Deans Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Saint Joseph, MO. There are 3 outdoor hard and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to food, lights, restrooms, and water.
fees: Fee required — Costs hourly: Mon-Thurs 10-4pm $20; Mon-Thurs 4PM-9PM $30; Fri-Sat 10AM-11PM $40; Sunday 12PM-7PM $40

name: St. Joseph Rec Center
description: St. Joseph Rec Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Joseph, MO. There are 6 wood and hard courts. 3 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
